title: Cherry Blossom Rain
description: Gentle cherry blossom petals drifting in a soft spring breeze. Perfect loop for meditation content, travel vlogs, and beauty brand overlays.

title: Neon Tokyo Nights
description: Rain-slicked streets reflecting neon kanji signs. The cinematic cyberpunk aesthetic of modern Tokyo captured in seamless loop format.

title: Zen Garden Dawn
description: Morning mist rising over meticulously raked white gravel. Embodies the wabi-sabi philosophy of finding beauty in imperfection and transience.

title: Torii Gate Mist
description: Iconic vermilion torii gates emerging from morning mist. The spiritual gateway between the mundane and sacred worlds of Shinto tradition.

title: Autumn Leaves Drift
description: Crimson and gold maple leaves spiraling in the cool autumn air of a traditional Japanese garden. Evokes the fleeting beauty of koyo season.

title: Rainy Shibuya
description: The famous Shibuya crossing in a moody downpour. Umbrellas of every color, steaming food stalls, and the relentless pulse of the city.

title: The Great Wave
description: Japanese woodblock print aesthetic, samurai in bamboo forest, dramatic composition, indigo and vermilion

title: Fushimi Inari at Dawn
description: Geisha in elaborate kimono walking through Kyoto autumn garden, maple leaves falling, cinematic

title: Golden Temple Reflection
description: Gion district Kyoto at night, traditional machiya townhouses, paper lanterns, cobblestone streets glistening

title: Autumn Campaign
description: Samurai tea ceremony scene, seated warrior removing helmet, peaceful interior, paper screens

title: Fuji at Dawn
description: Traditional Japanese pagoda with Mount Fuji in background, cherry blossoms, perfect postcard composition

title: Zen Garden Morning
description: Arashiyama bamboo grove in Kyoto, towering green stalks, dappled sunlight, peaceful and meditative

title: Warrior's Meditation
description: Samurai warrior on horseback crossing a river in autumn, red maple forest, majestic and powerful

title: Merchant Quarter
description: Edo period sumo wrestling match, crowd watching in traditional wooden arena, dramatic action pose

title: Fuji at Golden Hour
description: Aerial view of Mount Fuji surrounded by autumn foliage, misty clouds at the base, breathtaking scale

title: Shinjuku Midnight
description: Tokyo rooftop view at night, vast cityscape of lights stretching to horizon, Skytree glowing

title: Samurai's Path
description: Traditional Japanese teahouse in Edo era garden, tatami floors visible, bamboo fence, soft morning light

title: Gion Night Walk
description: Fushimi Inari shrine at dawn, thousands of vermilion torii gates, morning mist, no people, ethereal atmosphere

title: Koi Pond Harmony
description: Ukiyo-e style dragon emerging from stormy sea, waves crashing, bold lines and colors, Hiroshige inspired

title: Bamboo Grove Silence
description: Kinkaku-ji golden pavilion reflected in mirror-still pond, autumn maple trees, warm afternoon light
